channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Glass in goalmouths of kickabout pitch., 19th April
item.description:
I picked up quite a large amount of glass from both goalmouths. Some is still there embedded in the dirt. Don't know what the solution is here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in walkway leading to Linton Close from Lovel Avenue, 19th April
item.description:
Black bags taken from clothes bank located at Upper Wickham Lane/Lovel Avenue torn open and discarded in walkway. Also food waste. I last reported the same problem 30/3/26. It was cleared promptly but the same issue has happened again in the last 7 days. Can a camera be placed at this walkway?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boundary road by Dorman Way, 19th April
item.description:
Uprooted bollars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Boundary Road, St. John's Wood, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag flytipped., 19th April
item.description:
As above. Clothes and household rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass uncut, 19th April
item.description:
The grass on the verge outside our bungalow hasn’t been cut this year yet !! It’s very long and unsightly and we want to paint our wall which is impossible at the moment many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded rubbish bag on street, 19th April
item.description:
It looks like my neighbour overfilled their bin and an animal has gotten into it and pulled out one of the bags. That bag is now open on the street with rotting food that is attracting flies. Neighbour doesn’t seem interested in clearing up the mess as it has been there for 2 days. This is outside of 77 Dalberg Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalberg Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50 E-Lime Bikes Park dangerously in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 19th April
item.description:
50 E-Lime Bikes Park dangerously in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture abandoned, 19th April
item.description:
The presence of these large bins attracts Flytipping weekly. The bins themselves need moving elsewhere. Awful eyesore on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakley Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dry twigs and rubbish, 19th April
item.description:
Lots of dry twigs dumped near the Courtland Grove road sign. There are also lots of rubbish near this place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courtland Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti spray paint along albert emabankment wall where path is, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall of Albert Embankment almost opposite The Rose Pub on river path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Albert Embankment, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shoulder of Mutton Green, Welling, 19th April
item.description:
Items of clothing thrown into various trees x 6 on pathway on the green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Close, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned barrier, 19th April
item.description:
These barriers are here for monts now. Abstructed the traffic . Looks awful and i do not want to see daily from my kitchen. Cars can not pass each other because of this barriers. Limiting the space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): George Row, Bermondsey, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 19th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped and blocking pavement outside 217 Colyers Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Just outside 2 bromley crescent., 19th April
item.description:
It has been there for many months, just decided to report it now. There is also one further along in the middle of the road. So sorry but didn’t take a photo of it. Thank you for your kind attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bin, 19th April
item.description:
Please collect a bin that has been dumped on Linnell Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Shenley Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamplight between 52-53 Thamesbank Place, 19th April
item.description:
The lamplight cover is broken and hanging down, since weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thamesbank Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large gaps in pavement, 19th April
item.description:
Large gaps in between paving slabs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Burrfield Drive, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bellegrove road oppisite The westwood center, 19th April
item.description:
Chair dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead ginger cat, 19th April
item.description:
Dead ginger in the road left lane Ilderton Road junction Ablett Street SE16 3BL, in a position where it would continue to be run over and drivers were swerving to avoid the dead cat. Viewed at 5:15 am - 19/04/2026 by a Lewisham resident. Caller ask if a note can be put up to alert the owner.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ablett Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish overflowing but also has blown down alleyway and mound next to bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
